# Mergedle — AI Search Index

Mergedle is an unofficial Merge Tactics fan site with daily Wordle-style puzzle games.
All games are free and require no login. Game state is stored in your browser only.

## Active Games

- https://mergedle.com/classic — Classic Wordle: guess the daily Merge Tactics card from stat clues (elixir cost, traits, type, release year)
- https://mergedle.com/pixel — Pixel Card: guess the card from a pixelated card image that gets clearer with each wrong guess
- https://mergedle.com/skin — Skin Quiz: identify which card owns the daily skin image

## Site Pages

- https://mergedle.com — Homepage with all game modes
- https://mergedle.com/about-us — About Mergedle
- https://mergedle.com/privacy-policy — Privacy Policy
- https://mergedle.com/terms-of-service — Terms of Service

## Notes

- Puzzles reset daily at midnight UTC
- Not affiliated with Supercell
